vikriti.imbalance: Vata aggravation with secondary Pitta involvement

reasoning: Prakriti leans strongly toward Vata due to lifelong tendencies of dryness, irregularity, and mental quickness. Vikriti shows marked Vata aggravation (dry skin, insomnia, anxiety, joint cracking, cold extremities, constipation, weight loss, forgetfulness) with mild Pitta involvement (anorexia/overeating, early waking, racing thoughts). Raw/cold diet and travel further aggravate Vata.
